bugs.title: companion mode tool called on info query 2
bugs.description: Message 2 ('I'm near Praça do Comércio — what's a good lunch spot around here?') triggered a create_itinerary_items tool call attempting to add 'Lunch at Cantinho do Avillez' on day 1. The backend guardrail intercepted and returned status:not_needed, so no items were actually created, but the AI should not have called the tool at all on an informational query.
bugs.expected: No create_itinerary_items tool call on an informational lunch recommendation query
bugs.actual: create_itinerary_items called with 1 item (day 1: Lunch at Cantinho do Avillez). Backend guardrail blocked mutation.
bugs.api_command: buf curl SendMessage with content 'I'm near Praça do Comércio — what's a good lunch spot around here?' in CHAT_MODE_COMPANION

bugs.title: companion mode tool called on info query 6
bugs.description: Message 6 ('Recommend something fun to do tonight.') triggered a create_itinerary_items tool call attempting to add 'Fado Evening at Clube de Fado' on day 4. The backend guardrail intercepted and returned status:not_needed, so no items were actually created. This is the same regression trigger from Run 5 N-01 msg5 — the AI still conflates 'recommend' with 'add to plan'.
bugs.expected: No create_itinerary_items tool call on a recommendation query
bugs.actual: create_itinerary_items called with 1 item (day 4: Fado Evening at Clube de Fado). Backend guardrail blocked mutation.
bugs.api_command: buf curl SendMessage with content 'Recommend something fun to do tonight.' in CHAT_MODE_COMPANION

ai_behavior_issues.issue: AI attempts itinerary tool calls on informational queries despite companion-mode prompt instructions. The backend guardrail (status:not_needed) prevents actual mutation, but the unnecessary tool round-trip adds latency and wastes tokens. Messages 2 (lunch spot) and 6 (evening recommendation) both triggered this. The AI's prompt discipline does not fully distinguish 'recommend/suggest' from 'add to my plan'.
ai_behavior_issues.context: Messages 1, 3, 4, 5 correctly avoided tool calls. Messages 2 and 6 (both food/activity recommendations) incorrectly called create_itinerary_items.

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: The companion mode responses were helpful, concise, and phone-friendly (all under 185 words). The AI answered all 6 informational queries with relevant, practical information about Lisbon. However, the AI attempted to call create_itinerary_items on 2 of 6 purely informational queries (msgs 2 and 6), showing the prompt discipline gap between 'recommend' and 'add'. The backend guardrail successfully prevented actual itinerary mutation (final count 12 = N_BEFORE), so the user experience was preserved, but the extra tool calls add unnecessary latency.
